title: andromeda angustifolia
intro: Andromeda angustifolia, also known as the bog rosemary, is a flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. The medicinal properties of Andromeda angustifolia lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of the plant include its antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Andromeda angustifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
